description: Configure Odoo to support a 'Case of 24' Unit of Measure (where 1 Case equals 24 Units). Create a storable product named 'Glacier Spring Water 500ml' that uses 'Units' as its primary Unit of Measure and 'Case of 24' as its Purchase Unit of Measure. Create and confirm a purchase order for 5 Cases from the vendor 'AquaPure Supplies', then receive the products into inventory to verify the stock conversion.
